description_long: This is a modern flat-screen computer monitor with a wide rectangular display framed by a slim, matte black bezel. The front features a vibrant screen displaying a landscape image, while the rear is angular with a central vertical support column that has a red accent stripe. The stand is a broad, flat base that provides stability, and the monitor's back panel includes several visible ports on one side for connectivity. The overall construction appears to be primarily plastic with some metal reinforcement, and the design is sleek and professional, suitable for office or home use. No visible branding or decorative elements are present on the bezel or rear panel.
description: A sleek, flat-screen computer monitor with a slim black bezel, red-accented rear support, and a wide, stable base. Ports are visible on the back side, and the design is modern and professional.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide display screen with a thin black bezel and a landscape image on the screen.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the monitor's slim depth, angular rear, and the red accent stripe on the support column.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the angular back panel, central support column, and the broad, flat base.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the monitor's ports on the rear side and the red-accented support column.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is slim, matte black, with sharp corners and a flat profile, providing a minimalistic and modern appearance without any decorative elements.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a wide, flat rectangular base connected to a central vertical support column with a red accent stripe, likely made of sturdy plastic with possible metal reinforcement, and appears stable but not visibly adjustable.
attribute_button_placement: Physical buttons are located at the bottom center of the monitor, grouped together just below the screen.
attribute_port_visibility: Ports are visible on the rear right side of the monitor, with at least four ports present.
